name: Ceramic Speckled Table Lamp White - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Elevate your lighting with this Ceramic Speckled Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Standing 24.5 inches high, this elegant table lamp features a white fabric drum shade atop a white speckled ceramic base in a graceful gourd shape. The convenient lamp pole rotary dimmer switch offers three-way light settings — low, medium and high — to create the perfect ambiance for any occasion, and the five-foot cord offers flexible placement.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
